CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The Membership Join Date of the earliest (by Close Date) won Membership Opportunity where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. Uses the Closed Won Memberships filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date this Contact first joined as a member, based on their earliest Membership Opportunity.
CustomField.label: Membership Join Date
